product: Slack Access and Integration Logs managed ingestion connector (Beta) ​
tagline: June 2, 2026 The Slack Access and Integration Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: June 2, 2026 The Slack Access and Integration Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest workspace access logs and app integration change logs from Slack into Databricks.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
